# CWE-335 vulnerable: Incorrect Usage of Seeds in Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG) (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-335-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

func AssignQueueTicket(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	queue := r.URL.Query().Get("queue")
	if queue == "" {
		http.Error(w, "queue required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	seed := time.Now().Unix()
	rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(seed))
	ticket := strconv.Itoa(rng.Intn(10000))
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	w.Header().Set("X-Queue", queue)
	w.Header().Set("X-Ticket", ticket)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
